headline: McEwen Boosts Financial Strength With San Jose Dividend Payout
summary: MUX receives a $49.4M San Jose Mine dividend, lifting 2026 payouts above expectations and supporting expansion and balance-sheet goals.

headline: BASF and Cromology Turn Waste Tires Into Sustainable Wall Paint
summary: BASFY partners with Cromology to launch wall paint made from recycled tires, bringing circular economy innovation to decorative coatings.

headline: 4 Diversified Chemical Stocks to Gain From Demand Rebound
summary: The Zacks Chemicals Diversified industry is expected to benefit from an uptick in demand across major end-use markets and the end of destocking activities. APD, DOW, ALB and MEOH are set to gain from strategic actions and demand recovery.
